headline: Broadcom Expands AI Story With Symantec CBX And 400G Optical Push
summary: Broadcom has introduced Symantec CBX, an AI-driven security platform designed to extend enterprise-grade threat detection and incident prediction to a broader range of customers. The company has also joined Cisco, NVIDIA, and other industry participants to launch the 400G Optical Multi-Source Agreement, aimed at standardizing interfaces for next generation AI infrastructure. These moves expand Broadcom's reach in cybersecurity and AI networking, connecting its software and semiconductor...
